description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named cross-platform tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest), with multiple CGAL branches (5.3.x-branch, 5.4.x-branch, master), and multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Miniconda with the specified Python version, display the Python version, display conda info, set up JDK 1.8, install CGAL from the specified branch, and compile CGAL SWIG bindings.
